_comment: Maps each Telegram custom_emoji_id (string) to a symbolic name used by server/bot/emoji.ts. Populate with the IDs from the bot's own custom-emoji sticker set (EMOJI_STICKER_SET). Entries here are paired with stickers returned by getStickerSet to build the symbol -> custom_emoji_id map at startup. Unknown IDs in the sticker set (not listed here) are silently skipped. Symbols referenced by the bot: info, diamond, music, stats, package, broadcast, gear, check, profile, wallet, plus, ruler, sparkle.
